description: Test prompts for evaluating Expression LoRA facial emotion control

test_prompts.prompt: a 3d animated character, close-up face, happy expression, bright smile, joyful eyes, soft lighting
a 3d animated character, facial portrait, sad expression, downcast eyes, frown, moody lighting
a 3d animated character, close-up face, surprised expression, wide eyes, open mouth, dramatic lighting
a 3d animated character, facial portrait, angry expression, furrowed brow, intense gaze, harsh lighting
a 3d animated character, close-up face, neutral expression, calm gaze, relaxed face, studio lighting
a 3d animated character, facial portrait, fearful expression, worried eyes, tense face, dark lighting
a 3d animated character, close-up face, disgusted expression, wrinkled nose, grimace, natural lighting
a 3d animated character, facial portrait, excited expression, wide smile, sparkling eyes, bright lighting

generation_params.negative_prompt: multiple people, full body, blur, low quality, distorted face, bad anatomy
